PLAYOFFML
Saiaashish Vadapalli · MIT
METHODOLOGY

HOW IT WORKS

A four-stage pipeline from raw NBA API data to calibrated win probabilities — built for reproducibility.

01
DATA INGESTION
Fetch Playoff Logs
Ten seasons of NBA playoff game logs are pulled via the nba_api library. Rate-limited at 0.7s between requests to respect the NBA Stats API — full fetch covers 2,800+ individual game records across 2014–2024.
$ python src/fetch_data.py
nba_apiLeagueGameLog~2,800 games10 seasons
02
FEATURE ENGINEERING
Build Differentials
Raw box scores are transformed into Home − Away differential stats. Proxy advanced metrics (OffRtg, DefRtg, Pace, eFG%) are computed from raw counts using Basketball Reference formulas. Rolling 5-game windows capture momentum.
$ python src/preprocess.py → model_ready.csv
22+ featuresPossession proxiesRolling windows
03
TEMPORAL TRAINING
Train Without Leakage
Logistic Regression with StandardScaler inside a scikit-learn Pipeline. Train set: 2014–2022 playoffs. Test set: 2022–2024 playoffs — a strict temporal split to prevent future data leaking into training. 5-fold cross-validation on the training window.
$ python src/train.py → playoff_predictor.pkl
Logistic RegressionStandardScaler5-Fold CVNo leakage
04
LIVE PREDICTION
Score Any Matchup
The predict.py CLI fetches current-season team averages from the NBA API, computes all 22+ differentials, runs them through the saved pipeline, and outputs calibrated home/away win probabilities in milliseconds.
$ python src/predict.py --home "Boston Celtics" --away "Miami Heat"
joblibLive NBA APICalibrated probabilities
PLAYOFFML
Saiaashish Vadapalli · MIT
MODEL INPUTS

KEY FEATURES

22+ engineered differential stats power every prediction. All computed as Home − Away to be era-agnostic.

LR
Algorithm
22+
Features
~68%
Test Accuracy
5-Fold
CV Strategy
DIFF_OFF_RTG_PROXY
Offensive Rating
Points scored per 100 possessions differential. The single strongest predictor — teams that score efficiently win playoff games.
ImportanceVery High
DIFF_DEF_RTG_PROXY
Defensive Rating
Points allowed per 100 possessions differential. Defense wins championships — especially in 7-game series.
ImportanceVery High
DIFF_REST_DAYS
Rest Day Advantage
Home minus Away rest days. Teams with 2+ more rest days show ~80% win rates historically — fatigue is measurable.
ImportanceHigh
DIFF_ROLL_PLUS_MINUS
Rolling Plus-Minus
5-game rolling net rating differential. Captures momentum and recent form heading into the matchup.
ImportanceMedium-High
DIFF_EFG_PCT
Effective FG%
Shooting efficiency accounting for 3-point value: (FGM + 0.5×FG3M) / FGA. Era-agnostic shooting quality signal.
ImportanceMedium
DIFF_TOV_RATE
Turnover Rate
Turnovers per 100 possessions differential. High-turnover teams bleed possessions — costly in tight playoff games.
ImportanceMedium
PLAYOFFML
Saiaashish Vadapalli · MIT
TECHNOLOGY

TECH STACK

Built entirely in Python — from data ingest to trained model artifact. No external ML platforms, no cloud dependency.

🐍
Python 3.13
RUNTIME ENVIRONMENT
All pipeline stages — fetch, preprocess, train, predict — run in a single virtual environment. Compatible with 3.10+.
🏀
nba_api
DATA SOURCE
Pulls game logs and current team stats from the NBA Stats API. Rate-limited wrapper to avoid throttling.
🐼
pandas
DATA ENGINEERING
Game-pair construction, rolling windows, Home−Away differentials, and all feature engineering transformations.
🤖
scikit-learn
ML FRAMEWORK
Logistic Regression inside a Pipeline with StandardScaler. GridSearchCV, cross_val_score, and classification_report for evaluation.
📈
seaborn
VISUALIZATION
Correlation heatmaps, feature distribution plots, ROC curves, and rest-day win rate bar charts — all saved to visualizations/.
💾
joblib
MODEL SERIALIZATION
Saves and loads the trained Pipeline as playoff_predictor.pkl — enables zero-retraining prediction at inference time.
PLAYOFFML
Saiaashish Vadapalli · MIT
INSIGHTS

VISUALIZATIONS

Four charts generated by visualize.py. Click any image to view full size.

🔍
Feature Correlation Matrix
Pairwise correlations between all 22+ differential features — identifies collinearity and redundant signals before training.
FEATURE ANALYSIS
🔍
Feature Distributions by Outcome
Density plots of each key differential split by Home Win vs Away Win — visualizes how each stat separates game outcomes.
DISTRIBUTION
🔍
ROC Curve — AUC = 1.000
Receiver Operating Characteristic with area under curve. AUC = 1.0 on training data — verify test-set evaluation to check for overfitting.
MODEL PERFORMANCE
🔍
Home Win Rate by Rest Day Advantage
Historical home win rate bucketed by rest advantage. Teams with +2 or more rest days win ~80% of playoff home games.
REST ADVANTAGE
